programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.sub-title: He Brought Roses and a Gun
programme.desc: Andrea believes that Ray Clark is the man of her dreams; but when she reveals she's pregnant, Ray becomes a nightmare; he stalks her and tortures their infant son; Andrea and her baby narrowly escape, but the next woman Ray meets isn't so lucky.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Child the Killer
programme.desc: Jeannette does everything she can to care for her son, Timmy; everything is going well until his dark side emerges, and he becomes violent and dangerous; despite every effort to help her son, she watches helplessly as he spirals into darkness.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: After a wife calls 911 to report her husband missing, police discover his lifeless body in his car, parked inside a corporate parking garage.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A man confesses to accidentally killing his best friend while cleaning his gun; during his interrogation, he stuns police by revealing that he's behind a long trail of bloodshed and is a serial killer who seems to consider himself an angel of mercy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.sub-title: He Didn't Know I Was There
programme.desc: A gunman shoots a man dead as he runs along a country road, and first responders find a witness standing next to the body with a strange story to tell; detectives unravel the lies of a callous psychopath who takes out his frustrations in bloodshed.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder Comes Home
programme.desc: Sue always dreamed of her own little quiet piece of paradise, but her dreams go up in smoke when a sinister guest comes knocking on August 27, 2001.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home
programme.desc: When Marlys Sather doesn't return to work after a lunch appointment, her family makes a horrifying discovery; someone set fire to this loving mother of three.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Unusual Suspects
programme.desc: After an 8-year-old girl is found strangled to death In Ocean Shores, Wash., a local woman is instrumental in helping detectives bring the young victim's killer to justice.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unusual Suspects
programme.desc: After a night out, a beautiful young woman ends up in a shallow grave, and her killer evades police for decades.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unusual Suspects
programme.desc: Like in a scene out of one of his Westerns, a former actor is gunned down in Yuma, Ariz., and police chase down leads across the Southwest until they finally get their man.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unusual Suspects
programme.desc: Police make an arrest in the contract killing of a California businessman and realize it's just the beginning of the story.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Interrogator
programme.sub-title: You Know What Time It Is
programme.desc: A mother of two is shot to death outside her apartment complex just minutes after returning home from her 30th birthday celebration; after interviewing multiple witnesses and suspects, Detective Fil Waters uncovers a shocking lead caught on video.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Interrogator
programme.desc: Jennifer McKinley, 28, is strangled to death in her bedroom while her young son sleeps; Detective Fil Waters learns the victim's mother was murdered 25 years ago in a case that has never been solved.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Interrogator
programme.desc: A woman experiences her worst nightmare when her 12-year-old son is abducted on Christmas Eve; Detective Fil Waters soon learns that the child has gone missing before and will stop at nothing to solve the case.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Interrogator
programme.sub-title: The Murders at Immaculate Auto Sales
programme.desc: Two generations of Contreras family members are shot in broad daylight while they are working at their family-owned car dealership; Detective Fil Waters boils it all down thanks to an eyewitness, a scorned woman and a videotape.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: In Georgia, officers find a car in a ditch with no sign of the male driver; when they speak to his best friend, the investigation takes a turn.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: In Indiana, police confront a hostage crisis as a murder-kidnap unfolds; in Florida, deputies race to save an unconscious man on a runaway boat.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: In Arizona, a police officer and firefighter respond to a vehicle collision; in Florida, police pursue a suspect who chooses an unexpected escape route; in Georgia, officers hunt an armed man hiding out in the woods.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: Oceanside police pursue a violent suspect following a domestic shooting; officers also intercept a reckless driver headed toward 10k runners; they rescue residents from a building fire.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: Police break into an apartment to save the lives of two women as their machete-wielding attacker leads officers on a pursuit; in Wisconsin, a winter storm causes a multi vehicle pile-up.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: In Colorado, a driver opens fire and sparks a chase; in Ohio, a man ignites a daylight shootout; in Florida, deputies race to find a missing boy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: This true-crime series hosted by Lt. Joe Kenda, one of America's toughest detectives, features incredibly disturbing and mind-blowing cases from across the country. Lt. Kenda expertly guides us through the complex twists and turns of these bizarre crimes.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: A gunman shoots a hero fireman dead in his own driveway. Police focus their investigation on the unusual firearm used to commit the crime and an odd trail of clues left behind by the victim himself.

programme.desc: A look at a witness account that could lead a small-town police department in the wrong direction as it tries to solve the murder of a friend.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End
programme.desc: In the coastal town of Leland, N.C., a missing woman is found dead in a swamp; as detectives speak with the victim's friends and family, they begin to unravel the truth behind a horrifying murder.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End
programme.sub-title: Murdered in the Cold of Winter
programme.desc: In Stamping Ground, Ky., a young woman's dead body is found late at night by her brother and father; when detectives learn the victim was pregnant, they consider it a motive for murder and begin a homicide investigation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: Forty-seven-year-old mother Joyce Aparo is found strangled to death near a road 70 miles from her home in Glastonbury, Conn.; the investigation leads detectives into a dark world of abuse, sexual obsession and lies.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: University of Miami football player Marlin Barnes and his friend, Timwanika Lumpkins, are beaten to death in Barnes' apartment; as detectives search for the killer, the crime sends shockwaves through the campus and community.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: Ann Anastasi returns home from shopping to find her husband, Anthony, lifeless in bed, a gun beside him; police soon find a second victim, Jacqueline Riggs, in the basement; later, they discover a dark tale of love, lust and violence.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: Hollywood golden boy Gavin Smith, a 20th Century Fox executive and former star UCLA basketball player, goes missing; for years, his family and detectives search tirelessly for answers, but a group of heartless characters hold fast to their secrets.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A couple escapes the dangers of the big city and moves to the country; however, they begin to suspect their new neighbors are involved in the drug trade, leading to a bloody conflict with children caught in the crossfire.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A rash of break-ins shatters the peace in a tight-knit community; when residents take sides, good friends turn into deadly enemies.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A U.S. Army veteran goes out of his way to make his neighbors feel welcome; when a child's birthday gift goes missing, it takes only 37 days for the friendships to end in a killing spree.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: In a tight-knit community, a new family commits a slight against a community member causing all of their neighbors to turn against them and leading to an explosive conclusion.

programme.title: Mean Girl Murders
programme.desc: At the cookie factory, friendships rise fast but so do rivalries; what starts as harmless gossip between co-workers soon turns sour; when jealousy and ambition boil over, the sweet life at the plant ends in cold-blooded murder.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Mean Girl Murders
programme.desc: A West Philadelphia neighborhood is left reeling when a high school track star, who had her eyes set on Olympic glory, disappears without a trace.

programme.title: Mean Girl Murders
programme.desc: A deserted, bloody vehicle makes detectives suspect murder; their investigation plunges them into Florida pageantry's cutthroat world and an unlikely suspect, unraveling a sordid tale of deceit and a shocking fall from grace.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Mean Girl Murders
programme.desc: The Bobbies function like a high school sorority; they're a philanthropic organization also known for wild initiation rituals and social exclusivity; when someone murders one of their own, every Bobbie becomes a suspect.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mean Girl Murders
programme.desc: Christa Pike is the only woman on death row in Tennessee; in 1995, she is introduced to Satanism, and her fascination grows until it comes to a deadly head in the woods one night in January.

programme.title: Mean Girl Murders
programme.desc: Las Vegas is a playground for top female fitness competitors; winning is important, and when jealousy spirals out of control, one woman loses her life.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: In May 2002, a couple goes missing in Ocean City, Maryland, almost as if they vanished into thin air, until a random, late-night burglary leads police to discover a tale of deception, brutality and savagery.

programme.title: Hollywood Demons
programme.desc: For the first time, insiders reveal dark secrets behind the #1 talk show.
